growth_records.notes: REVIEW secondary value (Table 2, ref [103], commercial). CDW 143 g/L, 50% P3HB, 3.97 g/L/h, 0.40 g/g sucrose. See separate in-text A. latus record (Grothe et al. [23]) which adds 25-37C, pH 6.5.

sec.method: productivity not given for this in-text condition

growth_records.cite: Jiang et al. Carbon Sources for Polyhydroxyalkanoates and an Integrated Biorefinery. International Journal of Molecular Sciences (2016). DOI:10.3390/ijms17071157. [PMC4964529]
growth_records.snippet: The optimised culture conditions of Alcaligenes latus with sucrose... 25-37 C, ammonium chloride or ammonium sulphate as the nitrogen source and a pH value of 6.5. Under these conditions, P3HB was produced and constituted up to 63% of dry c
growth_records.notes: REVIEW in-text secondary value (Grothe et al. [23]). Provides explicit conditions: 25-37C, pH 6.5, NH4Cl/(NH4)2SO4 N source. 63% P3HB of CDW, 0.40 g P3HB/g sucrose. Distinct from Table-2 A. latus sucrose row [103].
